failure_surface: Agent failed to execute any spreadsheet manipulation due to recurring Python syntax errors in code submission, resulting in zero test case passes.
root_cause: Agent repeatedly attempted to submit Python code with malformed string literal syntax and incorrect tool call formatting, causing execution failure before any data processing could occur.
minimal_fix_hypothesis: Before submitting code through tool calls, validate that all string delimiters are properly matched and that code blocks do not contain nested quote conflicts or formatting that would trigger syntax errors during parsing.
evidence: SyntaxError: unterminated string literal (detected at line 3) - shows mismatched quotes in code string
SyntaxError: invalid syntax on line 1 repeated across multiple attempts
No successful code execution - all attempts returned before any spreadsheet operations completed

memory_items.title: Code Syntax Validation Before Execution
memory_items.lesson: Always verify Python code is syntactically valid before passing to execution tools, checking for unmatched quotes, escaped characters, and proper string formatting.
memory_items.generalization: Pre-execution validation of code syntax prevents wasted tool calls and allows early detection of structural errors in any automated spreadsheet workflow.

memory_items.title: Tool Call Parameter Formatting
memory_items.lesson: When embedding code as a parameter value, ensure proper escaping of special characters and avoid nested quote conflicts that can break string literals.
memory_items.generalization: Properly escape or structure code content when passing through API or tool interfaces to maintain valid parameter boundaries.

memory_items.title: Error Diagnosis Through Iteration
memory_items.lesson: When encountering repeat syntax errors, pause to examine the specific error message rather than repeating similar code patterns that already failed.
memory_items.generalization: Identify whether an error is systemic (same pattern failing) before continuing retries; fix the underlying issue rather than varying superficially.

edits.content:
## Code Submission Best Practices

### Syntax Pre-Validation
- Verify all string delimiters are balanced before submitting code.
- Escape special characters appropriately when embedding code as tool parameters.
- Avoid nested quotes that could break parameter parsing.

### Error Response Protocol
- Stop retrying when the same syntax error repeats.
- Read the exact error location and message to identify the root cause.
- Correct the structural issue rather than varying the code superficially.

### Tool Interface Hygiene
- Test simple code snippets before complex operations.
- Ensure code blocks don't contain formatting that confuses the execution parser.
- Validate tool call structure separately from code logic validity.
